plugins.name: sasdocx
plugins.description: SASdocX — SAS-AM on-brand document generator: turn a company's Word, PowerPoint or Excel template into unlimited on-brand .docx/.pptx/.xlsx. Learn the template once into a reusable Brand Profile, then generate faithful documents - off-brand output impossible by construction. Skills: sasdocx, saspptx, sasxlsx. Based on the MIT-licensed brand-docs engine by Ferdinando Bonsegna.
